indicators.name: checkered floor
indicators.rationale: Checkered flooring can be distracting and difficult to work on for extended periods.

indicators.name: seating arrangement
indicators.rationale: Seating is arranged in booths, which are not suitable for solo computer work.

indicators.name: lack of flat work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height for setting up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: open windows
indicators.rationale: Open windows can lead to distractions and potential noise pollution.

indicators.name: lack of privacy
indicators.rationale: The open layout and seating arrangement do not provide sufficient privacy for focused solo work.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The checkered floor, seating arrangement, lack of flat work surface, open windows, and lack of privacy make it challenging to set up a productive workstation. However, the presence of tables and chairs suggests some potential for adaptation, though it would require significant rearrangement.
